parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5', max_tokens: 1800, messages: [ { role: 'user', content: 'Generate web-search queries to find the official websites of INDIVIDUAL volleyball CLUBS in ' + (($('Webhook').item.json.body||{}).country || '') + '. Use the LOCAL language(s) of that country for the volleyball term (Italy: pallavolo; Germany/Austria/Switzerland: Volleyball; Poland: siatkowka; Spain: voleibol; France: volley-ball; Greece: petosfairisi). Combine the volleyball term with club words (club / societa / Verein / klub / academy / youth / sezione / asd) AND with major cities and regions. ' + ((($('Webhook').item.json.body||{}).cities && ($('Webhook').item.json.body||{}).cities.length) ? ('Use these cities: ' + (($('Webhook').item.json.body||{}).cities).join(', ') + '.') : 'Choose the ~25 largest cities and main regions of the country yourself.') + ' Produce about ' + ((($('Webhook').item.json.body||{}).count) || 40) + ' DISTINCT queries, each likely to surface a single club own site (NOT federations, leagues, results/stats, news or directories). Respond ONLY with compact JSON {"keywords":[{"q":string,"lang":string}]} where lang is the 2-letter language code of q. No prose, no code fences.' } ] }) }}
